<!--
Thanks for contributing to Trellis. Keep the PR focused — one change per PR
makes review faster and safer.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 bullets on what changed and why. Skip "what" the diff already shows. -->

-

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Docs / examples / skills only
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Affected surface

<!-- Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] CLI (`trellis`)
- [ ] REST API (`trellis-api`)
- [ ] MCP server (`trellis-mcp`)
- [ ] Python SDK (`trellis_sdk`)
- [ ] Workers / extractors
- [ ] Stores (trace / graph / vector / blob / event log)
- [ ] Classification / retrieval / pack builder
- [ ] Schemas (breaking change risk — read CONTRIBUTING.md)

## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes.
- [ ] `make typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `make test` passes.
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change.
- [ ] Updated docs / examples / skills if behavior changed.
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` for user-visible changes.
- [ ] Honored the hard rules in `CLAUDE.md` (immutable traces, governed mutations, `extra="forbid"`, structlog only, type hints).

